audit.priceRangeSummary: Examples: Mistral Large 3 $0.50/M input, $1.50/M output; Medium 3.1 $0.40/$2.00; Small 4 $0.15/$0.60; Voxtral transcription from ~$0.002/min.
audit.limitsSummary: Voxtral supports ~13 languages, up to ~30 min transcription / ~40 min audio understanding; realtime latency target sub-200 ms.
audit.regionSummary: Mistral-managed cloud; regional specifics are less granular publicly than hyperscalers.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: small free/test quotas have been offered in Le Platform; check account plan.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your source sheet is outdated here: Mistral now has native audio/STT via Voxtral, but still no public native TTS.

supplementalResearch.title: 5. Mistral AI (France) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 5. Mistral AI (France) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. **EU-headquartered** — strongest GDPR positioning among core providers.

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|
| `mistral-large-2512` | **$0.50** | **$1.50** | 262K |
| `mistral-medium-latest` | $0.40 | $2.00 | 131K |
| `mistral-small-latest` | $0.10 | $0.30 | 128K |
| `codestral-latest` | $0.30 | $0.90 | 256K |
| `devstral-2-2512` | $0.40 | $0.90 | 262K |
| `ministral-3b-2512` | $0.10 | $0.10 | 556K |
| `ministral-8b-2512` | $0.15 | $0.15 | 256K |
| `ministral-14b-2512` | $0.20 | $0.20 | 256K |
| `open-mistral-nemo` | $0.02 | $0.04 | 128K |
| `pixtral-large-2411` | $2.00 | $6.00 | 131K |
| `magistral-medium-latest` | — | — | — (reasoning) |
| `voxtral-small-24b-2507` | $0.10 | $0.30 | — (audio transcription) |

Mistral Large 3 at **$0.50/$1.50** is dramatically cheaper than comparable flagships. Ministral 3B at $0.10/$0.10 with 556K context is the longest-context budget model. Voxtral offers audio input transcription but is not a full STT service.

**Free tier:** Rate-limited API access for experimentation. Le Chat web access free.

**Datacenters:** EU-based (Paris, France). Also on Azure, AWS Bedrock, Google Cloud.

**GDPR:** Native EU company. Data processed in EU by default. DPA available, SOC 2. Zero Data Retention option on Pro plan.

**Integration notes:** **OpenAI-compatible** chat completions format (`/v1/chat/completions`). Drop-in replacement. SSE streaming. No TTS or STT services.

---
